category_sources: Official Tronbyt GitHub organization describes pixlet as a maintained fork for pixel-based displays.
source_facts.description: App runtime and UX toolkit for pixel-based apps.
docs_sources: Official Tronbyt documentation has a Pixlet documentation section.
Official Tronbyt organization points users to Tronbyt documentation/wiki for getting started information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tronbyt/pixlet, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Pixlet documentation describes rendering and pushing Starlark apps as WebP images for Tronbyt displays.
source_facts.description identifies an app runtime and UX toolkit for pixel-based apps.
